title: coleus robustus
intro: Coleus robustus, also known as Coleus aromaticus or Coleus vettiveroides, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant is native to tropical Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Coleus robustus include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems, making it a valuable remedy in Ayurvedic medicine. Herbal preparations of Coleus robustus often include infusions, decoctions, and essential oil extractions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
